props.type: Array<{ href: string; iconClass: string; label: string }>

notes: The 'showfull' toggle and 'fullcontact' section implement a progressive disclosure pattern — the show/hide behaviour is JavaScript-driven on the live site. The fullAddress prop is rendered with line breaks between address parts. When phone is absent, the telnum strong element is omitted entirely. When location is absent the loclink div is omitted. When fullAddress is absent the entire fullcontact section including the showfull toggle paragraph is omitted.
